questions.question: Which of the following molecules has a linear shape?
questions.explanation: CO₂ has a linear shape with a bond angle of 180° due to sp hybridization of the carbon atom.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: A sigma (σ) bond is formed by the:
options: Overlap of s and p orbitals only
questions.explanation: A sigma bond is formed by the end-to-end (head-on) overlap of bonding orbitals along the internuclear axis.
questions.subject: Chemistry

questions.question: The bond order of O₂ molecule is:
questions.explanation: According to Molecular Orbital Theory, O₂ has 10 bonding electrons and 6 anti-bonding electrons. Bond order = (10 - 6) / 2 = 2.
questions.subject: Chemistry
